name: localization-japan-landing
prompt: We're launching our project-management SaaS in Japan. Help me take our English homepage into the Japanese market.
expected_output: Localization (not just translation): native in-market review, locale mechanics, cultural/market adaptation (local proof, channels, buying behavior), and transcreation for taglines — delivered on stated assumptions.
assertions: Distinguishes localization/transcreation from literal translation rather than just offering to translate the text
Calls for native, in-market review before launch (not machine translation alone)
Raises market/cultural adaptation: local proof/case studies, imagery, buying behavior, or channel differences (e.g. dominant platforms differ in Japan)
Mentions locale mechanics (formality register, text expansion/layout, date/currency, or international SEO/keywords researched fresh)
Delivers an actionable plan on stated assumptions rather than only asking questions
